title: Core dump with enum.name support
body:
---


Author Name: **Jonathon Donaldson**
Original Redmine Issue: 854 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-11-29
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

I've attached a very minimal example design which reproduces an issue that occurs when using the SV enum.name feature. Verilator reports a different error when running on windows vs linux.

On windows running under cygwin GCC, the error is:

```
compile.sh: line 12:  7852 Aborted (core dumped) $VERILATOR_ROOT/verilator_bin -cc --top-module top our_pkg.sv our.sv top.sv

```

On linux running GCC the error is:
```
%Error: our.sv:16: Member selection of non-struct/union object 'VARREF 'IR'' which is a 'REFDTYPE 'T_Opcode''
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)

```

Let me know if you need anything other info.
